rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the body text as a brief "see also" pointer to another article in the same special section. The citing essay does not use Morrison (2014) to build a specific argument, derive claims, borrow methods, or interpret results; it proceeds as an independent retrospective based on the author's own historical narrative. Because the citation functions as supplemental background reading rather than a meaningful input to the paper's contribution, this is a mention-level citation.
